title_en: Butter vs. Margarine: The Truth Unwrapped!
hook_en: Real butter or margarine — which is the better choice for your health?
hook_es: ¿Mantequilla real o margarina — cuál es la mejor opción para tu salud?
key_message: Real butter is a more natural choice compared to margarine, which contains industrial emulsifiers and artificial flavors.
visual_elements: Side-by-side comparison of butter and margarine
Close-up of butter ingredient label (cream, salt)
Close-up of margarine label (long list of ingredients)
Visual of margarine being spread, showing texture difference
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Real butter (cream, salt) vs. PROCESSED: Margarine (vegetable oils, emulsifiers, artificial flavors) — Margarine was originally created as a cheap substitute and contains industrial emulsifiers

title_en: The Battle of the Spreads: Butter vs. Margarine
title_es: La Batalla de las Untables: Mantequilla vs. Margarina
hook_en: Let’s break down the ingredients in your favorite spreads!
hook_es: ¡Vamos a descomponer los ingredientes de tus untables favoritos!
key_message: Margarine, a processed alternative, was created as a cheap substitute, containing emulsifiers not found in natural butter.
visual_elements: Table with butter and margarine on it
Zoom in on each ingredient list
Expressive reaction to margarine’s ingredient list
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Real butter (cream, salt) vs. PROCESSED: Margarine (vegetable oils, emulsifiers, artificial flavors) — Margarine was originally created as a cheap substitute and contains industrial emulsifiers
